detail.description:
Dive into the Enchanted Realm of Magic Sort: A Mystical Water Sort Adventure!

🎩✨ Discover Magic Sort! Mix colors in a world where every splash of water is a step into mystery. This isn’t just a game; it’s a journey through puzzles that sparkle with charm, inviting you to sort, match, and puzzle your way through.

🌈 Quick Play Guide 🌈

Start Simple: Tap a bottle to pick it up, and another to pour the water. Organize the water so each bottle has only one color.
Think Ahead: Pour water only if
